title: Create: Tornado Survival
description: Create Tornado Survival is a chaotic engineering‑meets‑weather modpack where ProtoManly’s Weather unleashes destructive storms while Create and its addons power your machines, factories, and defenses. Built on NeoForge with Steam ’n’ Rails, it blends at
body:
Create Tornado Survival throws you into a world where engineering brilliance meets unstoppable natural chaos. Built on NeoForge, this modpack combines ProtoManly’s Weather—with its violent tornadoes, lightning storms, and destructive winds—with the full creative power of Create, its addons, and Steam ’n’ Rails.

Design factories, automate survival, reinforce your bases, and build storm‑proof rail networks as the weather system actively reshapes the world around you. Every machine you build and every structure you design becomes part of the fight to outsmart nature itself.

Whether you’re engineering massive wind‑resistant contraptions, evacuating by rail as a funnel cloud forms, or rebuilding after a storm tears through your base, this pack delivers a tense, cinematic survival experience where creativity is your greatest weapon.
